docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50) SERVED JAN-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUGG, INC.
REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - HARRY FISHER; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF HARRY FISHER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUGG, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LUGG, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FISHER, HARRY AS TO DEFENDANT LUGG, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FISHER, HARRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUGG, INC. $9,667.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,742.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED HIS CLAIM THAT DEFENDANT DAMAGED HIS FURNITURE AND ACCESSORIES DURING A MOVE AND IS LIABLE FOR THE AMOUNT AWARDED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: CUZZOLINA, J.D. SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR FISHER, HARRY
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISHER, HARRY AS TO DEFENDANT LUGG, INC.
